name: Liam, 29
description: Liam is a software engineer with a keen interest in science fiction and technology. He enjoys films that offer intricate world-building and complex narratives, often preferring slower-paced stories that reward multiple viewings. Despite his love for cerebral content, he also has a soft spot for lighthearted comedies that can make him laugh out loud.

===PERSONA===
name: Maria, 45
description: Maria is a high school English teacher who values deep character development and emotional resonance in her movies. She tends to favor dramas and period pieces that explore human relationships and societal issues. However, she also appreciates well-crafted action films that balance thrilling sequences with thoughtful storytelling.

===PERSONA===

He loves movies that are visually stunning and innovative, from the latest blockbusters to indie films that push the boundaries of cinematography. While he enjoys action and sci-fi genres, he also finds himself drawn to documentaries that offer unique perspectives on everyday life.

===PERSONA===
name: Ethan, 60
description: Ethan is a retired history professor who prefers movies that transport him to different eras and places. Historical epics and biopics are among his favorites, as long as they are well-researched and respectful of the past. He also enjoys crime dramas that offer intricate plots and compelling performances, but can be put off by overly graphic violence.

description: Priya is a social worker who gravitates towards films that address social justice and inequality.
